visual_description: A vintage, colorful van with a surfboard on its roof drives down a city street lined with trees and buildings. The scene then shifts to a view from a moving vehicle traveling along a winding country road through a lush, green landscape under a partly cloudy sky. A person on a bicycle is briefly visible in the distance, riding ahead on the same road.
audio_description: Upbeat rock music with a male vocalist singing in English plays throughout the clip.
